description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical bottle with a metallic, slightly reflective upper section and a matte, dark lower body. The neck of the bottle is slender and tapers smoothly to a small, red-tinted cap at the top. Around the midsection, there is a decorative gold emblem or badge affixed to the front, adding a touch of ornamentation. The bottle appears solid and robust, likely made from metal, with no visible transparency to the body. The surface finish varies, with the upper part being glossier and the lower part more matte. There are no visible signs of damage, and the bottle stands upright, suggesting it is designed for storage or display.
description: A tall, metallic bottle with a dark matte lower body, a glossy upper neck, and a red cap, featuring a gold emblem on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold emblem prominently on the dark lower body and the red cap on top.
description_view_1: Side view with the gold emblem partially visible, highlighting the bottle's cylindrical shape and metallic neck.
description_view_2: Rear view with no emblem visible, showing the smooth, uninterrupted surface of the bottle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the gold emblem just visible at the edge, emphasizing the bottle's symmetry.
attribute_label_or_branding: A gold emblem or badge is present on the front midsection; no other visible labels or text.
